findings.name: capacity
findings.headline: Healthy archetype distribution
findings.why_it_matters: No archetype dominates — the model has a diverse mix of feature roles.

findings.name: co_sensitivity
findings.headline: Co-Sensitivity refused to recommend any prune (7 groups found, but no prune-safe group)
findings.observation: k=7 functional groups, silhouette=0.48, permutation p=0.000, bootstrap ARI=0.52, best group NC fraction=12%.  Abort triggered because: no group has >50% Noise Candidates (best=12%).
findings.why_it_matters: Co-Sensitivity clusters features by gradient similarity. It only recommends pruning when a whole group is noise-dominated (>50%) AND the clustering itself is statistically supported. Refusing to prune is the SAFE outcome — the alternative is removing useful features.
findings.recommendation: Pruning is not warranted from this run. If you need to compress the model, use magnitude-based or movement pruning instead.
